name: open-perplexity
description: Perplexity web automation through Chrome DevTools Protocol, packaged as a reusable CLI and Codex/OpenClaw-friendly plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Ask Perplexity from a reusable local CLI.
interface.longDescription: Automates the Perplexity web app through Chrome DevTools Protocol so users can reuse their logged-in browser session from Codex, OpenClaw, or plain terminal workflows.
defaultPrompt: Run Open Perplexity with a prompt file.
Ask Perplexity with the Claude model.
Save a Perplexity reply to a markdown file.
